lead: Figures on this page are verified against the sources below.

sources.label: Coriolis
sources.what: Outfitting planner used to size the cargo, shield and core fit and confirm protected-hold capacity for the trade build.

sources.label: Elite Dangerous (official)
sources.what: Frontier's official Krait Mk II ship page — manufacturer specs, pad class, and the ship render used on this page.

sources.label: EDCD coriolis-data
sources.what: Authoritative optional-internal slot sizes (6·6·5·5·4·3·3·2·1), core sizes and hull mass behind the cargo maths.

sources.label: Inara — Krait Mk II
sources.what: Per-ship page cross-checked for hull price, base stats and the cargo-capacity reference quoted here.

sources.label: Fandom wiki
sources.what: Krait Mk II hull profile and internal layout used to frame its trading capacity against dedicated freighters.

sources.label: YouTube — Down to Earth Astronomy
sources.what: Comparison of the Krait Mk II against medium rivals, used to weigh its cargo and versatility against dedicated traders.
